notes: It seemed a little stuttery at first, and it took longer than I expected to load the shaders, but after I disabled Esync, it ran buttery smooth, and the shaders loaded really quickly.
title: TimeShift™

notes: After further testing, since previous report, the ESYNC launch option may cause issues with the loading of levels. But with the default config, the game works great out of the box. It does seem to take a little bit to load the shaders, but other than that, it works without issue.
title: TimeShift™

notes: loads into splash screen while loading shaders, then execution fails
title: TimeShift™

notes: Games would crash immediately at start up, tried different versions of proton. Tested using laptop with egpu (Vega 56) even though system spec says integrated graphics. Only game in my library I cannot get to run so not a problem with egpu setup.
title: TimeShift™
